data.title: Global Interconnection Group (GIG) acquires 20% stake in GIGA Holdings, partners with Scale-42 to develop AI data centres in Nordics.
data.description: Global Interconnection Group, known as GIG, has successfully acquired a 20% ownership in GIGA Holdings as part of a collaboration with Northern DC AS, operating under the name 'Scale-42'. This partnership has led to the formation of GIGA-42 Ltd., a new joint venture with a specific focus on building AI-enhanced data centers in the Nordics. For further details, please refer to the accompanying document.

data.title: Foster Wallace secures $665,000 jury verdict for KC car accident victim after $5,000 offer by State Farm pre-trial.
data.description: In Kansas City, Missouri on August 22, 2025, Foster Wallace Personal Injury Lawyers achieved a major trial success in representing a victim of a car accident in the Kansas City area. Despite an initial offer of only $5,000 from State Farm for the client's injury claim, the firm diligently advocated for...

data.title: Brompton Wellington Square AAA CLO ETF announces distributions on TSX (BAAA, BAAA.U) payable Sept 15.
data.description: In Toronto, it was disclosed on August 22, 2025 that the Brompton Wellington Square AAA CLO ETF (TSX: BAAA, BAAA.U) will be issuing distributions scheduled for payment on September 15, 2025. These distributions will be granted to unitholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on August 29, 2025.

data.title: Saudi Arabia's Circuit Breaker Market expected to reach US$152.32 million by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 6.18% due to infrastructure development and increasing electricity demand.
data.description: A report on the Saudi Arabia Circuit Breaker Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings, projecting a growth to US$152.32 million by 2033 from US$88.79 million in 2024. The market is expected to experience a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.18% between 2025 and 2033. This growth is driven by factors such as rising infrastructure projects, growing electricity needs, and sustained investments in smart grid technologies and renewable energy sources. There is a demand for efficient circuit breakers to meet the expanding energy requirements and modernization efforts in the region.

data.title: TransPerfect acquires Unbabel to enhance Language AI, adding TowerLLM and COMET AI tools. Aug 22, 2025.
data.description: TransPerfect, the leading language and AI solutions provider for global businesses, has acquired Unbabel’s TowerLLM and COMET AI tools. This significant move was announced on August 22, 2025, in New York and Lisbon, Portugal. TransPerfect continues to strengthen its GlobalLink Tech Stack with this addition, solidifying its position as the go-to provider in the industry. This acquisition further enhances TransPerfect's capabilities, adding value to its already impressive set of tools.

data.title: Mullen Group Ltd. declares monthly dividend of $0.07 per Common Share, payable on Sep 15, 2025 to holders as of Aug 31.
data.description: In Okotoks, Alberta, on August 22, 2025, the Board of Directors of Mullen Group Ltd. (TSX: MTL) disclosed a monthly dividend of $0.07 per Common Share for shareholders as of the record date on August 31, 2025. The dividend distribution is scheduled for September 15, 2025.

data.title: Duo Health in Chicago appoints new President and Chief Operating Officer.
data.description: A new President and Chief Operating Officer has been appointed by Duo Health in Chicago. The company made an announcement regarding this key appointment.

data.title: Red Lobster aims for a brand revival by targeting Black diners, hoping nostalgia and new CEO will help after 60+ years.
data.description: Will nostalgia, the appointment of a new CEO, and innovative seafood boil bags be sufficient to revive the seafood chain, which has been in operation for over six decades?

data.title: Takeda stock falls to $14.53 in premarket, rebounds to $15.47, after FDA approval of rival drug Dawnzera by Ionis Pharmaceuticals.
data.description: Takeda Pharmaceutical Co Ltd's stock experienced volatility on Friday, dropping to $14.53 during premarket trading before recovering to $15.47 by the end of the day. This fluctuation coincided with the FDA's approval of Ionis Pharmaceuticals, Inc.'s Dawnzera for preventing hereditary angioedema attacks in patients aged 12 and above. Takeda already has a similar drug called Takhzyro approved by the FDA in 2018, with expanded usage authorization for pediatric patients in 2023. This significant development in the pharmaceutical industry can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nootropics Depot improves standardized and cost-effective Cistanche supplements; leading source of echinacoside, verbascoside.
data.description: In a groundbreaking development on August 22, 2025, in Tempe, Arizona, Nootropics Depot revealed a significant advancement in the standardization and accessibility of Cistanche supplements. This enhancement positioned their product range as the most economical and powerful option, containing crucial bioactives like echinacoside and verbascoside.

data.title: SmartAlpha accelerates U.S. expansion with Dr. Keerthi Vishnudas as Co-Founder to deliver real-time ultrasound AI solutions.
data.description: In Ankara, Turkey on August 22, 2025, SmartAlpha, a company specializing in ultrasound AI technology to enhance the use of ultrasound for procedural guidance, revealed that Dr. Keerthi Vishnudas, PhD, has been welcomed as a Co-Founder. Dr. Vishnudas will take on this new role as part of the team, where she will contribute expertise to further develop the company's AI solutions for ultrasound applications.

data.title: Inventor from Sonora, Calif. develops discreet money tracker for banks called QUARTER SAFE (SBT-1863) to track robbers.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on August 22, 2025, an inventor from Sonora, California, shared their innovative idea of concealing a GPS tracker within a bank robber's money bag. This invention, known as the QUARTER SAFE, provides a solution for law enforcement to easily track the robber’s whereabouts precisely. The inventor devised a method to disguise and embed the GPS tracker within the bag, facilitating efficient tracking. This creation has the potential to aid authorities in combating crimes as it allows for real-time monitoring of suspects.

data.title: H&M to launch collaboration with Mexican designer Lorena Saravia on October 16, featuring modern Mexican fashion.
data.description: In New York on August 22, 2025, it was announced that H&M will debut its new collaboration with Mexican fashion designer Lorena Saravia on October 16. The upcoming collection will feature Saravia's distinctive style known for its modern and empowering essence. The partnership is highly anticipated and is set to attract a wide audience when it launches in a few months.

data.title: 2026 Jeep Cherokee revealed in NYC event with LL COOL J, part of 'America's Original Influencer' campaign.
data.description: Recently unveiled in Brooklyn, New York, the 2026 Jeep® Cherokee made its debut in front of a large audience of Jeep enthusiasts both in person and online. The event featured a performance by musical artist LL COOL J, known as "America's Original Influencer," in a 60-second spectacle.
